# Reserved36 Recompact2 Micro3 Contract

## Reserved 36k
full compaction reserved context headroom defaults to 36k tokens so long sessions reclaim earlier while keeping summary room

## Recompact 2
full compaction min recompact growth defaults to 2% and speculative buffer to 2.5k so reclaim can fire again sooner

## Micro 3
micro compaction keeps the last 3 messages and clears tool results from 24 tokens so bulky tool output reclaims earlier

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + strategy/micro/status vitest
